author: b.hartnett
content: https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/892088344438255616/1521859942892699669. Perhaps the payload was generated with invalid BAL upstream? Not sure. I'm not suggesting that the CL needs to care about anything related to rlp encoding. Just pointing out the fact that we received invalid BAL from CL.

author: tersec
content: Agree the CL isn't responsible per se for the BAL (or other RLP). That Hive test is EL-focused though

author: tersec
content: i.e. it's going to effectively be testing the EL <-> EL path with a CL incidentally in between

author: potuz
content: Yeah that's more like it. The generator of that BAL is the one that should send the right bytes here. We just forward whatever we get. Modulo SSZ engine subtleties this should remain
